# Savindu Thathsara

> AI & automation engineer based in London. Builds practical automation, AWS workflows, and modern web systems. Studying BSc (Hons) Computing with Artificial Intelligence at Northumbria University, London.

Savindu Thathsara is a web developer and automation-focused engineer with 7+ years of experience. He ships React, Next.js, Vue, and WordPress systems and works with AWS, CI/CD, GitHub Actions, Docker, and workflow automation. Open to AI and automation roles in the UK.

- [Home](https://savithathsara.me/): Portfolio homepage and selected systems
